purpose.title: Purpose of the system
purpose.intro: universum. is a platform for comprehensive child development support.

childCard.title: Child card — the core of the system
childCard.description: Centralized profile combining all child development data: protocol results, indicator dynamics, class history and personalized recommendations.

protocols.title: PPC protocols
protocols.description: Automation of psychological-pedagogical councils: structured assessment using checklists, generation of conclusions and recommendations.

workLog.title: Work log
workLog.description: Planning and tracking of individual and group sessions, attendance control, specialist workload statistics.

features.title: Key features
items: Creating and maintaining electronic PPC protocols
Structured assessment of student development using checklists
Automatic generation of conclusions and recommendations
Work directions — the system matches educators to a child's needs
Public specialist profiles with qualifications, directions and fees
Educator recommendations for parents based on PPC and test results
Statistics and analytics on protocols, specialist KPIs
Export protocols to PDF and Excel
Access management for different user levels
Child cards with protocol history and development dynamics
Interactive business processes and instructions for all roles

childCard.title: Child card
childCard.intro: The centralized child profile combines all information about their development, sessions and progress.

personal.title: Personal data
personal.description: Full name, date of birth, gender, parent contacts, education level

history.title: Protocol history
history.description: All PPC protocols with conclusions and recommendations

dynamics.title: Development dynamics
dynamics.description: Charts and comparison of indicators across protocols

matching.title: Specialist matching
matching.description: Educator recommendations based on identified issues and work directions

recommendations.title: Recommendations
recommendations.description: Personalized recommendations and booking educators by direction

roles.title: User roles
roles.specialist: PPC Specialist: creates protocols, maintains schedule, public profile with work directions, manages service cost
roles.admin: Organization administrator: manages staff, sets cost visibility, KPIs and analytics for the organization
roles.regional: Regional operator: views protocols of all organizations in the region, regional analytics
roles.systemAdmin: System administrator: full access to all functions, user and organization management, business processes

workflow.title: Workflow
steps: Register in the system and receive access after administrator approval
Create a new protocol with student details
Fill in the structured assessment checklist
Automatically generate a conclusion based on assessments
Save the protocol and generate reports

support.title: Technical support
support.text: If you have questions or technical problems, contact your organization administrator or the system technical support service.

security.title: Data security
security.text: All personal data of students and their parents is reliably protected. Access to protocols is provided only to authorized specialists in accordance with their role. The system complies with personal data legislation.

trial.text: Trial period: after request approval, a 7-day trial with unlimited protocols is provided

card.title: Card payment
card.description: We accept MIR cards, SBP and other online payment methods. Fast connection and instant subscription activation.

invoice.title: Invoice for legal entity
invoice.description: Educational organizations can pay by bank transfer. We provide all necessary accounting documents.

portal.title: Purchase through supplier portals
portal.description: The system is available for procurement through official supplier portals in accordance with 44-FZ and 223-FZ.

supportDialog.title: Support
supportDialog.description: We are always ready to help you
supportDialog.intro:
If you have any questions, our team is ready to help!
Write to us — we will reply within 24 hours.

chat.label: Online chat
chat.value: You can also contact us via the chat at the bottom of the page!

sections.title: 1. General provisions
sections.text: This document is the official offer (public offer) of Individual Entrepreneur Zagladin V.S. (hereinafter 'Contractor') to any individual or legal entity (hereinafter 'Customer') to enter into a contract for the provision of access to the automated information system 'PPC' (hereinafter 'System' or 'Service').

sections.title: 2. Subject of the contract
sections.text: The Contractor undertakes to provide the Customer with access to the System for creating, storing and managing psychological-pedagogical council (PPC) protocols, and the Customer undertakes to pay for the services in accordance with the Contractor's tariffs.

sections.title: 3. Cost of services
sections.text: The cost of services is determined by the current tariff plans: Monthly subscription: 2 500 ₽ per month; Yearly subscription: 25 500 ₽ per year (15% savings). A 7-day trial with full access to all features is provided.

sections.title: 4. Payment procedure
sections.text: Payment is made by transfer to the Contractor's settlement account or through the YuKassa payment system. The service is considered rendered from the moment access to the System is provided.

privacyDialog.title: Privacy policy
privacyDialog.description: Processing and protection of personal data

sections.title: 1. General provisions
sections.text: This Privacy Policy defines the procedure for processing and protecting personal data of users of the 'PPC' System in accordance with the requirements of Federal Law No. 152-FZ 'On Personal Data' dated 27.07.2006.

sections.title: 2. Data collected
sections.text: In the process of using the System, the following categories of data may be processed: full name, contact phone number, email address of the user; position and place of work; data about children (full name, date of birth, education level); results of psychological-pedagogical assessments; PPC session protocols.

sections.title: 3. Purposes of processing
sections.text: Personal data is processed for the purposes of: providing access to the System; creating and storing PPC protocols; generating statistical reports; communicating with users.

sections.title: 4. Data protection
sections.text: The operator applies organizational and technical measures to protect personal data in accordance with the requirements of 152-FZ. All data is stored on secure servers using encryption and access control. Access to personal data is provided only to authorized employees of educational organizations.

sections.title: 5. Rights of data subjects
sections.text: Users have the right to: receive information about the processing of their personal data; request clarification, blocking or deletion of data; withdraw consent to data processing; appeal the operator's actions or inaction to Roskomnadzor or in court.

sections.title: 6. Operator contacts
sections.text: IE Zagladin V.S., TIN: 770702169499, PSRNIE: 323774600132891, Email: info@profilaktika.site

sections.title: Technical support

Working hours: Mon–Fri, 9:00–18:00 (MSK)

sections.title: Commercial questions
sections.text: To receive a commercial offer, fill out the form in the system or write to email: info@profilaktika.site

dataProcessingAgreement.title: Consent to personal data processing
dataProcessingAgreement.description: Please review the terms of personal data processing

sections.title: 1. General provisions
sections.text: I hereby give my consent to the processing of my personal data in accordance with Federal Law No. 152-FZ 'On Personal Data' dated 27.07.2006.

sections.title: 2. Personal data
sections.text: Personal data includes the following information: full name; email address; phone number; position and place of work; region and organization; data on created protocols and documents.

sections.title: 3. Purposes of processing
sections.text: Personal data is processed for the following purposes: providing access to the information system; user identification; maintaining records of psychological-pedagogical council protocols; generating reports and statistics; ensuring information security; sending notifications related to the system operation.

sections.title: 4. Methods of processing
sections.text: Personal data is processed using automation tools and without them. Processing includes collection, recording, systematization, accumulation, storage, clarification (updating, modification), extraction, use, transfer (provision, access), anonymization, blocking, deletion and destruction of personal data.

sections.title: 5. Transfer of personal data
sections.text: Personal data is not transferred to third parties, except as provided by the legislation of the Russian Federation. Access to personal data is granted only to authorized employees of the educational organization and system administrators.

sections.title: 6. Security of personal data
sections.text: The operator ensures the security of personal data by applying organizational and technical measures aimed at protecting personal data from unauthorized or accidental access, destruction, modification, blocking, copying, provision, distribution, as well as other unlawful actions.

sections.title: 7. Validity period
sections.text: This consent is valid from the moment it is provided until it is withdrawn. The consent may be withdrawn by the personal data subject by sending a written request to the operator.

sections.title: 8. Rights of data subjects
sections.text: The personal data subject has the right to: receive information about the presence of personal data; request clarification of their personal data; request blocking or destruction of personal data; withdraw consent to personal data processing; appeal the operator's actions or inaction.

sections.title: 9. Contact information
sections.text: For questions about personal data processing, you can contact the system administrator through the feedback functionality in your personal account or at the email address specified in your profile settings.

dataProcessingAgreement.footer: By providing my personal data during registration, I confirm that I have read this agreement and agree to the terms of processing my personal data.
